# SalmanSaaS — AI Agents for Local Business Automation

## Overview
SalmanSaaS is an AI-native automation platform designed for local businesses in the MENA region. We provide intelligent agents that work 24/7 to automate bookings, customer management, order processing, and business operations via WhatsApp and integrated channels.

## Core Offering
- **AI Booking Agents**: Automated WhatsApp-based booking system with instant confirmations and smart rescheduling
- **Customer Engagement**: Intelligent follow-up messages, reminders, loyalty programs, and surveys
- **Inventory Management**: Real-time product/availability tracking with automatic customer updates
- **Order Automation**: Seamless order processing, payment handling, and fulfillment tracking
- **Analytics & Insights**: Live dashboards with daily sales, customer trends, and profit recommendations
- **Local Data Storage**: All customer data stored securely on your server, never sent to third parties

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: React 19 + Vite + Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: FastAPI + Supabase PostgreSQL
- **AI Layer**: LLM-powered agents for intent understanding and automation
- **Security**: AES-256 encryption, GDPR-compliant, regular security audits

## Key Features
1. **WhatsApp Integration**: Direct two-way communication with customers
2. **No-Code Setup**: Configure automation recipes without technical knowledge
3. **Multi-Tenant SaaS**: Fully isolated tenants with independent configurations
4. **Real-Time Notifications**: Instant updates to customers and staff
5. **Payment Processing**: Secure local payment handling with invoice generation
6. **Multi-Language Support**: Arabic and English with RTL optimization

## Use Cases
- **Restaurants**: Menu management, order automation, delivery tracking
- **Salons & Services**: Appointment booking, reminder automation, customer retention
- **Real Estate**: Property inquiries, viewing requests, document automation
- **E-Commerce**: Order fulfillment, inventory sync, customer follow-up
- **Hotels & Hospitality**: Room booking, guest services automation, check-in flow

## Business Model
- **SaaS Subscription**: Per-module pricing (booking, restaurant, store, loyalty)
- **Custom Automation Recipes**: Tailored workflows for specific business needs
- **White-Label**: Available for agencies and resellers

## Data & Privacy
- Local storage guarantee: Customer data remains on your infrastructure
- No data selling or third-party sharing
- Compliance with MENA data protection regulations
- Automated encrypted backups

## Security Standards
- AES-256 encryption for all data
- Regular third-party security audits
- Automated intrusion detection
- GDPR and CCPA compliance

## Contact & Support
- **Website**: https://salmansaas.com
- **Email**: support@salmansaas.com
- **WhatsApp**: +961-78-727986
- **Documentation**: https://docs.salmansaas.com

## Company
Founded in 2024, SalmanSaaS is building the AI automation infrastructure for thousands of local businesses across the MENA region, helping them grow without the overhead of manual operations.
